How To Make Italian Brainrot Memes - Tralalero tralala AI Animation
Use DAN20 for 20% off - https://openart.ai/home?ref=brainrot

Italian Brainrot is going viral everywhere! In this Tutorial I show you how to make Italian brainrot memes using OpenArt. I show you how to make the voice and also how to combine multiple characters into one video. This is the easiest method to create tung tung tung sahur and tralalero tralala brainrot videos. No experience needed

1. OpenArt  - for visuals & videos
Use DAN20 for 20% off - https://openart.ai/home?ref=brainrot
